body.title: fix: _extract_tool_call fires on code_ref tool output
body.result: Fixed: _response_from_tool_dispatch flag skips _extract_tool_call for code_ref results; inline synthesis for large results with 800-char fallback cap. Verified: read ~/TheIgors/CLAUDE.md → Igor posts capped content to channel.
body.description: code_ref dispatch sets response_text to raw tool output; _extract_tool_call finds <tool>name</tool> tags in file content and misfires. Fix: _response_from_tool_dispatch flag + inline synthesis for large results.
